Container.Name: RustSearch
Container.Overview: RustSearch is a minimalist, privacy-focused metasearch engine with an integrated AI assistant. It proxies queries through SearXNG to protect your privacy, and processes AI queries locally in the browser using Wllama or via a self-hosted API.
Container.Requires: SearXNG metasearch runs inside the same container in the background.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The host port mapped to the web server (default container port: 4408).

Config.Name: Access Keys
Config.Description: Optional comma-separated list of keys to restrict access to search and inference endpoints.

Config.Name: Access Key Timeout Hours
Config.Description: How long a valid access key remains cached before revalidation is required (set to 0 to disable timeouts).

Config.Name: Internal OpenAI API Base URL
Config.Description: Base URL of a self-hosted or external OpenAI-compatible API to offer custom AI processing.

Config.Name: Internal OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: API key for the custom OpenAI-compatible API.

Config.Name: Internal OpenAI API Model
Config.Description: Specific model ID to use for the custom API (leave empty to fetch and select a random model from the endpoint).

Config.Name: Internal OpenAI API Display Name
Config.Description: Display name for the custom API in the settings dropdown menu.

Config.Name: Default Inference Type
Config.Description: Default AI processing location to select (e.g. 'local' for on-device browser models, 'internal-api' for custom endpoint).

Config.Name: Default Local Model ID
Config.Description: Default local Wllama model ID to download and run in-browser.
